attributes.title: MENQOL (30-item)
attributes.body: For each of the following items, indicate whether you have experienced the problem in the PAST MONTH. If you have, rate how much you have been bothered by the problem. Please note, some of these questions are quite personal, so you may want to complete this survey in private.
